intro: Cota ormenioides, also known as Ormenis ormenioides, is a plant species belonging to the Asteraceae family, commonly used in traditional medicine. The health benefits of Cota ormenioides include its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties, which have been reported to alleviate symptoms of various diseases such as fever, digestive issues, and respiratory problems. The bioactive constituents of this plant include flavonoids, phenolic acids, and saponins, which contribute to its medicinal properties.
